programmes.show_description: 2/2. The epic tale of Libyan leader Omar Mukhtar concludes with relentless resistance to Italian conquest - through sacrifice and bloodshed. Anthony Quinn and Ollie Reed star.
Kevin McNally stars as Porthos, one of the Three Musketeers, in this award-winning short drama.
2/10. Marcus returns to an old stomping ground in search of veg-growing tips and helps a local farmer with hay bailing.
Archaeologists Alex and Peter and historian Ruth try Edwardian life for a year. The team branch out into market gardening, all-year-round egg production and beef cattle.
9/20. An antiques expert, a market trader and an upcycler compete to make the most money. Catherine Southon, Tony Wong and Micaela Sharp head to Faversham.

25/35. Charlie and Lee are in Fareham to create a relaxing, productive garden for Lisa, Mike and their two boys, inspired by their travels - a space the whole family can enjoy.
2/10. Marcus returns to an old stomping ground in search of veg-growing tips and helps a local farmer with hay bailing.
Archaeologists Alex and Peter and historian Ruth try Edwardian life for a year. The team get to grips with the revolutionary technologies of the age.
8/8. A piece of Ayrton Senna's race car and a poster from a Sex Pistols tour that never happened are some of the rarities up for grabs this time. Last in series.
Tonia Buxton is on the island of Naxos, famous for its beaches and local cuisine. She sets out to pick vine leaves as the basis for the famous Greek dish, dolmades.(S1/E5)
Tonia Buxton heads for Santorini with its spectacular volcanic scenery and lively nightlife. She visits a tomato farm where she gathers her ingredients to make delicious tomato fritters.(S1/E6)
8/8. Is British grass-fed beef the best regarding food miles? Is bottled water is worth the price. Plus, the healthiness of lunchtime meals.
Archaeologists Alex and Peter and historian Ruth try Edwardian life for a year. The team get to grips with the revolutionary technologies of the age.
3/10. Marcus is on the hunt for the perfect chicken and gets a lesson in developing his own mushroom patch.

2/3. Alan meets Anne and Mike who has dementia. The layout of the house and garden means Mike is finding it difficult to cope and risks never leaving his home.
Bad girls don't come to London, they're made in London. Suzy, a young country girl, is led astray by the wild members of a rock group. Contains nudity and 70s social attitudes.
During the 1922 Turkish Civil War, two American adventurers and a band of mercenaries guard a covert transport through hostile territory. Tony Curtis and Charles Bronson star.

Archaeologists Alex and Peter and historian Ruth try Edwardian life for a year. The team leave the farm in search of work and head to the coast to reap the ocean's bounty.
1/4. A five-diamond platinum sparkler, Italian marble chimney piece and Tibetan dagger go under the hammer. Will a guitar signed by The Rolling Stones give someone satisfaction?
In Cyprus, Tonia Buxton sets out on a fishing trip with her father, to catch local octopus. It's not always easy to catch them, but well worth it when she cooks up octopus and red wine stew (S1/E7)
In this episode, Tonia Buxton pays a visit to Greece's capital Athens. She cooks avgolemono soup, which is a filling chicken and rice dish, and souvlaki - Greece's favourite fast food.(S1/E8)
Scottish-born actor Alan Cumming explores the picturesque Outer Hebrides of Scotland, touring the Western Isles from Barra to Stornoway on Lewis, Eriskay and the Callanish stones.
Archaeologists Alex and Peter and historian Ruth try Edwardian life for a year. The team leave the farm in search of work and head to the coast to reap the ocean's bounty.
4/10. Marcus is on the hunt for perfect cows and heads down to the village pub with other local growers.

3/3 The team come up with a radical new layout for wheelchair users Nina and Steve so they can enjoy their back garden.
A detective film set in seedy seventies London. A serial killer is targeting women who all appeared in the magazine Playbirds . Contains adult scenes.
